features.name: large width multiplication with registered feedthrough
features.description: Code should include a multiplication operation where operands are 64 bits wide producing a 128-bit result, with the result registered in an always @(posedge) block and then fed to another register

features.name: multi-stage multiplication pipeline with fan-out
features.description: Code should include a multiplication result that is passed through two pipeline registers where the intermediate register feeds both a computation and another register
